changes.description: SEO admin panel and changelog page
changes.reasoning: Internal tooling to monitor meta titles/descriptions across all vault pages and track project changes over time.
Some vaults report extremely high APY values due to short-term spikes or data anomalies. Capping at 100% prevents misleading data from appearing on the site.

changes.description: File-based data cache for GitHub Actions
changes.reasoning: Moved from live API calls at build time to pre-fetched JSON files. This decouples data freshness from site builds and avoids API rate limits during static export.

changes.description: SEO content — commentary, FAQ, statistics, and earnings calculator
changes.reasoning: Rich, unique content on each vault page improves search engine rankings and provides genuine value to users evaluating yield options.
SEO-friendly URLs with descriptive slugs rank better and are more shareable. Each slug contains the asset, protocol, and chain for keyword relevance.

changes.description: Charts for TVL, APY, and Share Price history
changes.reasoning: Visual performance data helps users evaluate vault stability and trends over time, increasing page engagement and time-on-site.
Added time-series data for TVL, APY, and share price to support charts and statistical analysis on each vault page.

changes.description: Switch to Harvest Finance REST API
changes.reasoning: Replaced dummy/seed data with live vault data from the Harvest Finance API, providing real APY, TVL, and protocol information.
Established the core Next.js application with static export, Tailwind CSS styling, and placeholder vault data to validate the page structure and design.
